questions.text: What is the purpose of the Output Parameter Determination (OPD) in the billing process?
options: To manage the determination of output parameters for billing documents such as invoices, credit notes, and debit notes
To configure SAP access for users

questions.text: Which billing document type is used for a preliminary bill to request payment or show to customs?
What should be included in the body section of an export invoice?
options: Commodity Codes, Customer Information, and Transport Costs
PO Number, Unit Net Price, and Quantities Shipped

questions.text: Who is responsible for determining the appropriate template and language for billing documents?
What type of validation is triggered by exceeding predefined thresholds for Financial Credit Memo Requests?
